name: MangaDex
description: The world's largest manga aggregator. Free, no CF protection.

name: Comick
description: Multi-language manga and manhwa aggregator. Cloudflare-protected — requires CloakBrowser.

name: NovelFull
description: Web novel translations. Returns chapter text (no page images). Cloudflare-protected — requires CloakBrowser.

name: Mangapill
description: Fast manga reader with cover proxy support.

name: Royal Road
description: English web fiction and light novels. Returns chapter text (no page images).
